title: Deflector Field
description: -just add a block ,Input FE to activate energy Field, then deflect incoming projectile attacks.(r=8)input rendstone can off
body:
-just add a block ,

Input FE to activate energy field, then deflect incoming projectile attacks.(r=8)input rendstone can off

adds advanced defense technology to Minecraft. Build energy field generators that consume Forge Energy (FE) to detect and deflect incoming projectiles like arrows, create big cannon, and more.

-Projectile Deflection: Automatically detects and deflects arrows, fireballs, wither skulls, and more

The field accepts FE. You can charge it with any other block that supports FE output.

-Forge Energy Powered: Uses standard FE power system, compatible with all major tech mods
When it has FE and is not receiving a redstone signal, it will deflect nearby projectile entities. A single entity may be affected multiple times if it remains within range after one operation.
The main use can be seen in The Adventure Of Valkyrie (TAOV).

-Valkyrien Skies Support: Works on ships

--No new ores or dimensions, just pure technology
This mod only adds such a block. Currently, no other items in this mod have a standalone energy field. The Valkyrie Space War that has an energy field not only has the energy field, but it does not use FE; instead, it uses GT power.

If there has been no update here for a long time, you can try checking CF  https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deflector-field

-只是加了一个护盾方块

输入FE 然后就能偏转半径8之内的实体 引导向别处 至少弓箭与cbc大炮的炮弹都有用 输入红石来关闭

护盾接受FE 用其他任何只要是支持FE输出的mod的方块对其进行充能即可

在拥有FE且未接收到红石信号时 会对周围的弹射物实体进行偏转 一个实体可能因单次操作之后仍在范围内而被多次操作

主要用途见瓦尔基里大冒险(TAOV)

整个mod仅是增加了这样的一个方块 针对当前mod之中未见有其他单独拥有能量护盾的项 目前有能量护盾的瓦尔基里太空战争不只是能量护盾 并且未做FE而是用的GT的电力

如果这里长时间未更新 可以尝试检查CF  https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deflector-field

谢谢长矛长 谢谢所有长矛长
